title: Deploying
description: Run CReact apps in production with state persistence and proper process management.
production_run_outro: This runs your entry point once. CReact reconciles the current component tree against persisted state, applies changes, saves the new state, and exits.
ci_cd_intro: CReact apps work well in CI/CD pipelines. The app reads previous state, reconciles, deploys changes, and writes new state, all in a single run.
state_storage_intro: For production, store state in a remote backend instead of the local file system. Implement the <0>Memory</0> interface for your storage:
storage_s3: <0>S3:</0> store state JSON in an S3 bucket
storage_dynamodb: <0>DynamoDB:</0> use a table for concurrent-safe state
watch_mode_intro: For apps that should run continuously (like servers or monitors), use watch mode:
watch_mode_outro: Watch mode restarts the app when source files change, preserving state between restarts.
tip_process_manager: For long-running processes, use PM2 or systemd to manage restarts and logging.
